title: 桜花賞の後に・至宝は未だ遠く

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Gaaaaah! I've had it! Come on, Trainer, we're
going back right this second!
choice_data_list: I know you must be frustrated, but...
I know you must be frustrated, but...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Not only did I miss out on the number one spot, I
didn't even beat Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I want to be anywhere but here, stat!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now hurry up! Every second you spend dawdling
is a second I could be training!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The next Tiara race—the Japanese Oaks—is just
around the corner! We don't have time to sit
around!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! Next time, I won't let anyone else be number
one!
